SELECT `t`.`CartId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`UserId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`AddedAt`, `t0`.`CartId`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Weight`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`, `t0`.`CreatedAt0`, `t0`.`Description0`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder`, `t0`.`Name0`, `t0`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt0`, `t0`.`ImageId`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder0`, `t0`.`ImageURL`, `t0`.`IsPrimary`, `t0`.`ProductId1`
FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`
ORDER BY `t`.`CartId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`

FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`
ORDER BY `t`.`CartId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`

    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`

    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`

SELECT `t`.`CartId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`UserId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`AddedAt`, `t0`.`CartId`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`Weight`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`, `t0`.`CreatedAt0`, `t0`.`Description0`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder`, `t0`.`Name0`, `t0`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt0`, `t0`.`ImageId`, `t0`.`DisplayOrder0`, `t0`.`ImageURL`, `t0`.`IsPrimary`, `t0`.`ProductId1`
FROM (
    SELECT `c`.`CartId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`UserId`
    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`
ORDER BY `t`.`CartId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`

    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `c0`.`CartItemId`, `c0`.`AddedAt`, `c0`.`CartId`, `c0`.`ProductId`, `c0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c1`.`CategoryId` AS `CategoryId0`, `c1`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `c1`.`Description` AS `Description0`, `c1`.`DisplayOrder`, `c1`.`Name` AS `Name0`, `c1`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c1`.`UpdatedAt` AS `UpdatedAt0`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder` AS `DisplayOrder0`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId1`
    FROM `cartitems` AS `c0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `c0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
    INNER JOIN `categories` AS `c1` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `c1`.`CategoryId`
    LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`CartId` = `t0`.`CartId`
ORDER BY `t`.`CartId`, `t0`.`CartItemId`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId0`

) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`

ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`

    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`OrderItemId`, `t`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t`.`DiscountAmount`, `t`.`FinalPrice`, `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`OriginalPrice`, `t`.`ProductId`, `t`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`

    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`

    INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0

    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`

    FROM `orders` AS `o`
    LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
    LEFT JOIN `payments` AS `p` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `p`.`OrderId`
    WHERE (`o`.`OrderId` = @__id_0) AND (`o`.`UserId` = @__userId_1)
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`

) AS `t0` ON `t`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `p`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`

) AS `t` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t`.`OrderId`

2026-05-05 19:30:03.834 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `o`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0) AS `quantity`, COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`FinalPrice` * CAST(`o`.`Quantity` AS decimal(65,30))), 0.0) AS `revenue`
FROM `orderitems` AS `o`
INNER JOIN `orders` AS `o0` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `o0`.`OrderId`
INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
WHERE `o0`.`Status` <> 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY `o`.`ProductId`, `p`.`Name`
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0) DESC
LIMIT @__p_0
2026-05-05 19:51:40.517 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `o`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0) AS `quantity`, COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`FinalPrice` * CAST(`o`.`Quantity` AS decimal(65,30))), 0.0) AS `revenue`
FROM `orderitems` AS `o`
INNER JOIN `orders` AS `o0` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `o0`.`OrderId`
INNER JOIN `products` AS `p` ON `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`
WHERE `o0`.`Status` <> 'Cancelled'
GROUP BY `o`.`ProductId`, `p`.`Name`
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0) DESC
LIMIT @__p_0

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`Weight`, `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

FROM `orders` AS `o`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE `i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE `o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
